ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the head referee */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* Network broadcasting the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the play belongs to */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the game (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time remaining in the quarter when the play occurred */,
  "down" INTEGER /* Current down during the play */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Yards needed for the first down */,
  "yardline" TEXT /* Yardline where the play started */,
  "play_description" TEXT /* Description of the play */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., pass, run, kick) */,
  "play_result" TEXT /* Result of the play (e.g., touchdown, sack, incomplete) */,
  "penalty" INTEGER /* Indicates if a penalty occurred during the play */,
  "penalty_yards" INTEGER /* Number of yards for the penalty */,
  "penalty_team" TEXT /* Team that committed the penalty */,
  "play_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the play in seconds */,
  "play_end_time" TEXT /* Time remaining in the quarter when the play ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the team represents */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., NFC, AFC) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., North, South) */,
  "established" TEXT /* Date the team was established */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., QB, RB, WR) */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height (e.g., 6'2") */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Overall pick number in the draft */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "injuries" TEXT /* History of injuries (if any) */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play associated with the statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose statistics are recorded */,
  "yards_gained" INTEGER /* Yards gained by the player during the play */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns scored by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown by the player */,
  "rush_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts by the player */,
  "rush_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards by the player */,
  "rush_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of rushing touchdowns */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions by the player */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards by the player */,
  "receiving_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of receiving touchdowns */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles by the player */,
  "interceptions_thrown" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown by the player */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles by the player */,
  "fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles lost by the player */,
  "punt_returns" INTEGER /* Number of punt returns by the player */,
  "kickoff_returns" INTEGER /* Number of kickoff returns by the player */,
  "return_yards" INTEGER /* Total return yards by the player */,
  "return_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of return touchdowns by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, fan) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* User's zip code */,
  "city" TEXT /* User's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* User's state */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the user's session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the trend */,
  "analysis" TEXT /* Analysis or insight derived from the game data */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the trend analysis was created */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., offensive, defensive, special teams) */,
  "trend_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score indicating the strength or importance of the trend */,
  "trend_period" TEXT /* Period the trend covers (e.g., first half, second half, full game) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_trends_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game report */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the report is about */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of key points and statistics from the game */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., game summary, player performance, team analysis) */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Name of the author who generated the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reports_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
